note: The Crossroads Board — Stage 1 seed. Each 'crossing' is a decision fork the community + agents steer. Local + versioned; the model lives in lib/hermes/crossroads.ts. Community sync + token-weighted voting (stages 4-5) integrate later via API and stay out of the free local core.

crossings.question: Which sound should the next expansion pack chase?

options.label: West-coast G-funk
options.rationale: Warm synth leads + laid-back bounce — a lane the current packs don't cover.

options.label: UK drill
options.rationale: Sliding 808s + sparse menace; pairs with the vhs-lofi scene pack.

options.label: Soul / gospel
options.rationale: Choir stacks + live-room warmth for the emotional, triumphant records.

crossings.question: On the final chorus, should the hook repeat verbatim or evolve one line?

options.label: Repeat verbatim
options.rationale: Maximum singability and payoff — the reward circuit loves the return.

options.label: Evolve one line
options.rationale: A small mutation on the last pass rewards close listeners and lifts replay value.

crossings.question: What should the brain grow next?

options.label: Influence Studio
options.rationale: Describe a feel → craft parameters (felt, never copied) — the WIFI DJ framework Part 1.

options.label: Story Mode
options.rationale: A playable come-up arc that unlocks personas/regions as the brain becomes you.

options.label: Pro Studio Rack
options.rationale: A DAW-style rack of swappable, upgradeable engine units — the professional stack.
